kit.name: NightCityMP
kit.note: Pinned inventory of everything a NightCityMP release kit bundles. sha256 values are verified against the upstream GitHub release assets and are the integrity gate for scripts/make-release-kit.sh. Bump 'version' when the client build or any pin changes.

client_artifact.contents_note: 34-file game-root overlay: CyberpunkMP.dll + assets/{redscript,Archives,Inputs,Tweaks}. zzz prefix keeps RED4ext load order AFTER the Codeware/ArchiveXL/TweakXL/input_loader deps it calls into.
client_artifact.sha256_note: First-party CI output, rebuilt every push; not integrity-pinned here. The kit script fetches it from a green Windows CI run (gh run download).

server_artifact.sha256_note: First-party CI output; not integrity-pinned here.
server_artifact.gap: linux.yml does NOT currently upload an artifact. Until an upload-artifact step is added (or a local build/linux/x86_64/release tree is provided via --server-dir), the Linux server tarball cannot be assembled end-to-end. The kit script aborts cleanly in that case rather than shipping a partial tarball.

third_party.name: RED4ext
third_party.layout_note: game-root overlay: bin/x64/winmm.dll, red4ext/RED4ext.dll, red4ext/LICENSE.txt, red4ext/THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.txt

third_party.name: redscript (scc)
third_party.layout_note: game-root overlay: engine/tools/scc.exe, engine/tools/scc_lib.dll, engine/config/base/scripts.ini, r6/config/cybercmd/scc.toml
third_party.pin_note: Pin held on the 0.5.x line (NOT the 1.0 prereleases). Deployed engine/tools/scc.exe + scc_lib.dll are byte-identical to this archive's contents.

license.in_archive_note: This release archive ships NO license file. THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md carries the MIT text fetched from the tagged source.

third_party.name: Codeware
third_party.pin_note: v1.20.4-beta.1 exists upstream; pin held at 1.20.3 = compile-green baseline. Deployed Codeware.dll is byte-identical to this archive's content.

third_party.name: Input Loader
third_party.pin_note: CONFIRM PIN: the kit ships v0.2.3 (the pinned target), but the currently DEPLOYED game install was observed running an OLDER v0.1.1 (stale leftover). v0.2.3 is the intended ship version; recommend a play-test on v0.2.3 before cutting a public release. Repo is jackhumbert/cyberpunk2077-input-loader (NOT jackhumbert/input_loader).
